prompt: I'm about to build a user authentication system with login, registration, and password reset. Can you create a class diagram for it before I start coding? The key entities are: Users, Sessions, and email-based password reset tokens.

assertions.description: Diagram contains User, Session, and ResetToken classes (or equivalent names)
User has email and passwordHash attributes; ResetToken has token and expiry
User has register/login/validatePassword or equivalent auth methods
Relationships exist linking User to Session and User to ResetToken
YAML is parseable and has 'classes' and 'relationships' top-level keys
Every relationship 'from' and 'to' references a class that exists in the classes list
